tasks.label: Test Backend Connection
tasks.command: npx prisma db pull && npm run dev

tasks.label: Check PostgreSQL Connection
tasks.command: node -e "const { Pool } = require('pg'); const pool = new Pool({ user: 'postgres', host: 'localhost', database: 'ControlDocumental', password: '28toby', port: 5432 }); pool.connect().then(client => { console.log('✅ Conexión exitosa a PostgreSQL'); client.release(); pool.end(); }).catch(err => { console.error('❌ Error al conectar a PostgreSQL:', err); pool.end(); });"
